questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: How many parallelograms are there in the figure given below?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: How many rectangles are there in the figure given below?

solutions.solution: Supposing AB as a base, Number of parallelograms = ABDC and ABFE = 2 Supposing CE as a base, Number of parallelogram = CBDE = 1 Supposing CD as a base, Number of parallelogram = CDFE = 1 ∴ Total number of parallelograms = 2 + 1 + 1 = 4

Smallest rectangles = ABDE, EFJI, ILKH, HGCD, DEIH = 5 Rectangles formed with two rectangles = ABIH, DELK, CGIG, DFJH = 4 Rectangles formed with three rectangles = ABLK, CFIG = 2 ∴ Total number of rectangles = 4 + 2 + 5 = 11
